basics.name: Gregory Sainton
basics.label: Research Engineer in Machine Learning
basics.summary: Research Engineer in Machine Learning at Observatoire de Paris (LUX Team). PhD in Astrophysics. Working on SKA radioastronomy source detection and peatland cartography.

work.name: Observatoire de Paris - LUX Team
work.summary: Machine learning research applied to astrophysics and Earth observation.
highlights: SKA (Square Kilometre Array) - ML algorithms for automated source detection in radio data
Peatland cartography using machine learning and remote sensing

work.name: Institut de Physique du Globe de Paris (IPGP)
work.position: Research Engineer - Planetology and Space Sciences Lab
work.summary: Research engineering for planetary science missions.
highlights: NASA InSight mission - tools for analysing data from the Martian seismometer SEIS
AIT of the Lunar seismometer FSS (Farside Seismic Suite), NASA CLPS programme
Development of IoT devices for a homemade turbidimeter

work.name: Ministere de l'Education Nationale
work.position: Primary school teacher for deaf and impaired hearing children
work.summary: Primary school teacher for deaf and impaired hearing children.
highlights: Taught a wide range of subjects to children with hearing impairments
Adapted teaching methods and materials to meet the needs of students
Collaborated with parents, specialists, and other educators to support student learning

education.institution: Universite Pierre et Marie Curie, Paris
courses: Spectroscopie des supernovae a grand decalage vers le rouge

education.area: Particules, Noyaux, Atomes et Photons - IP2I
courses: Internship: Spectroscopy of type Ia supernovae with VLT/FORS1
Internship: Calibration of the Faber-Jackson relation using Cepheids

projects.name: SKA - Square Kilometre Array
projects.summary: ML algorithms for automated source detection in radio astronomy data, applied to SKAO SDC1 benchmark.

projects.name: NASA InSight - Mars Seismology
projects.summary: Tools for analysing data from SEIS, the first seismometer on Mars. Contributed to multiple publications on marsquake detection.

projects.name: FSS - Farside Seismic Suite
projects.summary: AIT of the Lunar seismometer to be deployed on the far side of the Moon under NASA CLPS programme.

projects.name: Peatland Cartography
projects.summary: Machine learning applied to remote sensing data for automated peatland mapping.
